title: zephyranthes flava
intro: Zephyranthes flava, also known as the yellow rain lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Zephyranthes flava include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Zephyranthes flava is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions.
